draft:
Dear angryclient@protonmail.com,

Thank you for reaching out to us regarding a potential double charge. We understand your concern and are looking into this matter. As our records for your account are not immediately available for review, we will need a little time to investigate thoroughly. A member of our team will be in touch shortly to discuss this further.

Best regards,
The Team
draft_rationale: The client's status is 'churned or inactive', so the response adopts a re-engagement tone while acknowledging the billing issue and deferring specifics until a review is complete.
